resolution.feature_policy: Cargo-selected features from codex-cli; --all-features is not used
resolution.dev_dependency_avoidance: RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP=1 cargo -Z avoid-dev-deps, matching Fedora cargo-rpm-macros behavior
resolution.fixed_point: Starting from the authoritative selected identities, follow every non-development normal/build Cargo.lock dependency of external packages and every non-development workspace dependency declaration, regardless of target predicate or optional activation.
resolution.reason_model: Each resolver-only package records a deterministic dependency_path plus the immediate lock reference that requires its source metadata.

generator.license_metadata: normalized Cargo package manifest from the checksum-verified registry archive
